Scoring hits with the battle skill's Thunder Strike increases this effect by <@ba.vup>+1%</>.
Every casting of the battle skill <@ba.key>Mantra of Sundering</> again resets this <#ba.pulseenhance>Electric Amp</> effect.

talents.name: Ordained by Heaven
talents.description:

After DMG Immunity is triggered, Zhuang Fangyi is also restored for <@ba.heal>9%</> Max HP. The HP restoration effect can only trigger once every <@ba.vup>99</>s.

basicAttack.name: Jolting Arts
basicAttack.description:
BASIC ATTACK: 
An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</>. As the controlled operator, <#ba.lastcombo>Final Strike</> also deals <@ba.poise>18</> Stagger. 

DIVE ATTACK: 
Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</> to nearby enemies. 

FINISHER: 
Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</> and recovers some SP.

battleSkill.name: Mantra of Sundering
battleSkill.description:
<#ba.consume>Consumes</> the target's <#ba.conduct>Electrification</> to increase the DMG multiplier of this battle skill and create [<#ba.statuslevel>Status Level</> of <#ba.conduct>Electrification</> <#ba.consume>consumed</> <@ba.key>+1</>] <@ba.key>Sunderblades</>. If the battlefield has fewer than 3 <@ba.key>Sunderblades</>, Mantra of Sundering can still create 1 <@ba.key>Sunderblade</>, even if it does not <#ba.consume>consume</> any target's <#ba.conduct>Electrification</>.
Zhuang Fangyi then channels all <@ba.key>Sunderblades</> nearby to successively unleash Thunder Strikes on the target, dealing <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</> and giving bonus Ultimate Energy, with the final Thunder Strike dealing 6 times the DMG.
<@ba.info>A single battle skill casting can only create a max of 3 Sunderblades.</>

comboSkill.name: Breath of Transformation
comboSkill.description:
COMBO TRIGGER: When the controlled operator's <#ba.lastcombo>Final Strike</> or Finisher hits an enemy with <#ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</>.
Zhuang Fangyi creates a Xiranblitz Array that attacks the enemy and deals <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</>. If the Array hits an enemy that has <#ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> stack(s), then it will <#ba.consume>consume</> the said <#ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> stack(s), forcibly apply <#ba.conduct>Electrification</>, and give Ultimate Energy based on the number of stacks <#ba.consume>consumed</>.
If <#ba.conduct>Electrification</> is forcibly applied to an enemy that already has <#ba.conduct>Electrification</>, then apply <#ba.statuslevel>Status Level</> +1 to the enemy's <#ba.conduct>Electrification</>.

ultimate.name: Smiting Tempest
ultimate.description:
Transforms into the <@ba.key>Empyrean of Truth</> that grants these enhancements:
Zhuang Fangyi's basic attacks are enhanced and her actions are harder to interrupt;
Battle skill <@ba.key>Mantra of Sundering</> gains a higher DMG multiplier and an increased effect range, and the final Thunder Strike also applies <#ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> to the target hit.
Combo skill <@ba.key>Breath of Transformation</> gains a higher DMG multiplier, cooldown becomes 4 times faster, and effects are applied to enemies within a small area.
The first casting of the battle skill <@ba.key>Mantra of Sundering</> does not consume SP nor <#ba.conduct>Electrification</>, and if a target is available, the battle skill is guaranteed to create 3 <@ba.key>Sunderblades</> even if the target has no <#ba.conduct>Electrification</>.

talents.name: Nicks and Scratches
talents.description:
Battle skill improved: After <@ba.key>Wolven Ambrage</> deals DMG, Rossi applies <#ba.rossi>Razor Clawmark</> to the target for <@ba.vup>15</>s. This effect cannot stack.
For the duration of <#ba.rossi>Razor Clawmark</>, the target takes <@ba.vup>25%</> ATK (Rossi's) of <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> per second and suffers <@ba.pd>Physical DMG Taken</> and <@ba.fire>Heat DMG Taken</> <@ba.vup>+6%</>.

battleSkill.name: Crimson Shadow
battleSkill.description:
Charges to the target to deal <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> and apply <#ba.airborne>Lift</>.
If the target already has <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> stack(s), the skill also unleashes a <@ba.key>Wolven Ambrage</> that charges at the target to deal <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</>.

comboSkill.name: Moment of Blazing Shadow
comboSkill.description:
COMBO TRIGGER: When an enemy has both <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> and <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</> stacks.
Rossi's combo skill has 2 consecutive sequences. COMBO SEQUENCE 1 deals <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> to the target.
COMBO SEQUENCE 2 <#ba.consume>consumes</> all <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</> stacks from the target, deals <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> based on the number of Arts Infliction stacks <#ba.consume>consumed</>, applies 1 instance of <#ba.airborne>Lift</>, and buffs Rossi's Critical Rate and Critical DMG Dealt at the same time.
If COMBO SEQUENCE 2 is cast with <@ba.key>perfect timing</>, it applies 1 more stack of <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</>.

ultimate.name: "Razorclaw" Ambuscade
ultimate.description:
Rossi flutters her cape and unleashes a flurry of stabs that quickly deals multiple sequences of <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</> to the target. She then performs a two-sequence slash attack with her dagger that deals massive <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</> and applies <#ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</>.
<@ba.info>When this skill successfully scores a critical hit, it deals higher Critical DMG.</>

<@ba.key>Waterspouts</> created this way have the same effects as those created by the battle skill <@ba.key>IMA WAVERIDAAH!</> and gain DMG Dealt <@ba.vup>+40%</>.

basicAttack.description:
BASIC ATTACK: 
An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</>. As the controlled operator, <#ba.lastcombo>Final Strike</> also deals <@ba.poise>18</> Stagger.

FINISHER: 
Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</> and recovers some SP.

battleSkill.name: IMA WAVERIDAAH!
battleSkill.description:
Tangtang jumps out from the water and fires a point-blank shot that deals <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</> to the enemy and creates a <@ba.key>Waterspout</>.
Casting the battle skill also consumes all nearby <@ba.key>Whirlpools</> to create additional <@ba.key>Waterspouts</> and <#ba.return>return</> some SP based on the number of Waterspouts created.
<@ba.key>Waterspout</>: Applies 1 stack of <#ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> on enemies within range and deals <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</> over time. If the battle skill creates multiple <@ba.key>Waterspouts</>, they also apply <#ba.spellvul>Arts Susceptibility</> to enemies (but not another stack of <#ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</>).
<@ba.info>DMG dealt by the Waterspout is treated as Battle Skill DMG.</>

comboSkill.name: RIVER, TO ME!
comboSkill.description:
COMBO TRIGGER: When applying <#ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> or dealing <#ba.spellburst>Arts Burst DMG</> to an enemy.
Tangtang unleashes a powerful jet stream that penetrates all enemies in its path, deals <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</> to them, and creates a <@ba.key>Whirlpool</>.
<@ba.info>Up to 2 Whirlpools can exist in the battlefield at any time.</>

ultimate.name: DA CHIEF SEES YOU!
ultimate.description:
Tangtang opens her eyepatch and unleashes an <@ba.key>OLDEN STARE</> from her eye that temporarily locks down, immobilizes, and deals <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</> over time to enemies within its area of effect.
When the <@ba.key>OLDEN STARE</> stops evolving, a rogue wave comes crashing down to deal massive <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</> to enemies in its area of effect.
If the controlled operator performs a dive attack in the <@ba.key>OLDEN STARE</> pattern, its evolution ends and the rogue wave is summoned immediately to deal even more <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</>.

After the battle skill successfully applies <#ba.frozen>Solidification</>, Yvonne gains additional Ultimate Energy based on the number of stacks <#ba.consume>consumed</>. This Ultimate Energy Gain effect can only trigger 1 time, even if the skill hits multiple enemies.

comboSkill.description:
COMBO TRIGGER: When the controlled operator performs a <#ba.lastcombo>Final Strike</> on an enemy with <#ba.frozen>Solidification</>.

While active, Frost-e-Bytee constantly releases energy to attack nearby enemies, deals <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</> to them, and <@ba.key>pulls</> them towards itself. After Frost-e-Bytee expires, it explodes to forcibly apply <#ba.frozen>Solidification</> and deal <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</> to nearby enemies.
After the combo skill successfully hits the enemy, Yvonne gains additional Ultimate Energy. This Ultimate Energy Gain effect can only trigger 1 time, even if the skill hits multiple enemies.

After reaching max stacks, Yvonne also gains a Critical DMG buff. When the skill is about to end, Yvonne's last enhanced BATK becomes an enhanced <#ba.lastcombo>Final Strike</> that deals massive <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</>.
If the enemy is <#ba.frozen>Solidified</>, Yvonne performs an additional attack that deals <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</> and then <#ba.consume>consumes</> the enemy's <#ba.frozen>Solidification</>.

An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</>. As the controlled operator, <#ba.lastcombo>Final Strike</> also deals <@ba.poise>22</> Stagger. 

DIVE ATTACK: 
Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> to nearby enemies. 

FINISHER: 
Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> and recovers some SP.

battleSkill.name: Rigid Interdiction
battleSkill.description:
Raises a shield that can block attacks, grants <#ba.guard>Protection</> to self and nearby operators, and immediately <#ba.return>returns</> some SP. 
When attacked while the said shield is raised, perform a retaliation bash that deals <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> and applies 1 stack of <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> to the attacking enemy.

comboSkill.name: Timely Suppression
comboSkill.description:
COMBO TRIGGER: When an enemy starts charging up a skill, or when the controlled operator is attacked and falls below 40% HP. 
A powerful downward punch that deals <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> to the enemy, while granting <#ba.shield>shields</> to self and another teammate (controlled operator prioritized).
DEF can further increase Shield points.

ultimate.name: Textbook Assault
ultimate.description: Swings the greatsword to perform 2 consecutive slashes to deal <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> and apply <#ba.weak>Weakness</>, followed by a powerful downward slam that deals massive <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> and applies <#ba.knockdown>Knock Down</> to all enemies within the area of effect.

talents.name: Improviser
talents.description: After an <#ba.enhance>Amped</> teammate's skill deals DMG, Antal restores the said teammate's HP by <@ba.heal>[72 + Strength×0.6]</>. This HP restoring effect triggers 1 time every <@ba.vup>30</>s for each operator.

talents.description: After an <#ba.enhance>Amped</> teammate's skill deals DMG, Antal restores the said teammate's HP by <@ba.heal>[108 + Strength×0.9]</>. This HP restoring effect triggers 1 time every <@ba.vup>30</>s for each operator.

battleSkill.name: Tiny Surprise
battleSkill.description:
Kicks an <@ba.key>Improvised Explosive</> that sticks to the target, applying <#ba.slow>Slow</> and exploding after a short duration. The explosion deals <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</> and <#ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</> to enemies in the area of effect. Defeating the target also sets off the <@ba.key>Improvised Explosive</> immediately.
<@ba.info>Only 1 Improvised Explosive can be present in the battlefield.</>

comboSkill.name: Free Giveaway
comboSkill.description:
COMBO TRIGGER: When an enemy has 2 or more stacks of <#ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> or <#ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</>. 
Shoots the target enemy to trigger a special explosion that deals <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</> and applies another <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</> of the element already on the enemy.

ultimate.name: Apex Prankster
ultimate.description:
Fluorite quickly moves in an arc and rapidly fires at the target within the arc to deal 4 sequences of <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</>. If an <@ba.key>Improvised Explosive</> has been stuck to the target, the skill detonates it immediately and increases the DMG and size of the explosion.
If the final DMG sequence hits a target with at least 2 stacks of <#ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> or <#ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</>, then apply the same <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</> again.
